expectations.text: Adds role='combobox' to the input or wrapping element
expectations.evidence: role='combobox' placed on the <input> element with full explanation

expectations.text: Includes aria-expanded to reflect open/closed state
expectations.evidence: aria-expanded='false'/'true' included on input with instruction to update in JS

expectations.text: Includes aria-controls pointing to the listbox
Adds role='listbox' to the results list
Adds role='option' to each result item
expectations.evidence: role='option' on each <li> with unique ids

expectations.text: Mentions aria-activedescendant for tracking highlighted option
expectations.evidence: aria-activedescendant explained in detail with the key insight that real focus never leaves the input

expectations.text: Covers keyboard pattern: arrows to navigate, Enter to select, Escape to close
expectations.evidence: Full keyboard table: Down/Up arrows, Enter to select, Escape to close, Tab behavior
First line of fix is adding a visible <label for='player-search'>
